stonetop.summary: A great scaly wurm, hundreds of feet long, that sleeps beneath the Great Wood and wakes to burn.

system.concept: A great scaly wurm, hundreds of feet long, that sleeps beneath the @UUID[Compendium.stonetop_pwd.stonetop-journal.JournalEntry.6kt1b8ozEREDCi4k]{Great Wood} and wakes to burn.
system.description: A great scaly wurm, hundreds of feet long. It sleeps somewhere beneath the @UUID[Compendium.stonetop_pwd.stonetop-journal.JournalEntry.6kt1b8ozEREDCi4k]{Great Wood}, waking every few decades to chew and burn a swath of destruction before sinking back into slumber. What it is — a primordial titan, a Green Lord weapon, the first and oldest draventao, or a manifestation of the @UUID[Compendium.stonetop_pwd.stonetop-journal.JournalEntry.5Kym1qDHTmM8XUQ6]{Things Below} — is for you to decide. Dormant, it is little more than a warm, smoking, tree-covered hill; woken, it is doom.
